SEARCH
Package com.noorlandmc.NoorItems.item

Class Armor

java.lang.Object
com.noorlandmc.NoorItems.item.Item
com.noorlandmc.NoorItems.item.DurableItem
com.noorlandmc.NoorItems.item.Armor
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.bukkit.event.Listener
Direct Known Subclasses:
CelestialChestplate, CelestialFootwear, CelestialHeadgear, CelestialLeggings, ElvenCloak, EmeraldBoots, EmeraldChestplate, EmeraldHelmet, EmeraldLeggings, GnomeHat, HalflingBoots, ObsidianBoots, ObsidianChestplate, ObsidianHelmet, ObsidianLeggings, OrcishGreaves, RubyBoots, RubyChestplate, RubyHelmet, RubyLeggings
public abstract class Armor extends DurableItem
Abstract base class for custom armor, inheriting from DurableItem.

Provides common properties and methods for all custom tools, such as ID, name, material, durability, and stack size.

Handles giving, item retrieval, and item identification, allowing subclasses to define specific behaviors and attributes.

  • Field Details

    • slot

      protected final ArmorSlot slot
      ArmorSlot in which this armor will be equipped

    • armorColor

      protected final org.bukkit.Color armorColor
      Color of the armor. This is useable because custom armor uses leather armor.

  • Constructor Details

    • Armor

      public Armor(org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin, String id, net.kyori.adventure.text.Component name)
      Creates a new Tool with the given plugin, ID, material, name, flavor text, other lore, stack size, and custom model data.
      Parameters:
      plugin - The JavaPlugin instance for this item
      id - A unique string identifier for this item type
      name - The custom name to display for this item

    • Armor

      public Armor(org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin, String id, net.kyori.adventure.text.Component name, net.kyori.adventure.text.Component flavor)
      Creates a new Tool with the given plugin, ID, material, name, flavor text, other lore, stack size, and custom model data.
      Parameters:
      plugin - The JavaPlugin instance for this item
      id - A unique string identifier for this item type
      name - The custom name to display for this item
      flavor - The flavor text to display for this item as the first line of lore

    • Armor

      public Armor(org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin, ArmorSlot slot, String id, net.kyori.adventure.text.Component name, net.kyori.adventure.text.Component flavor)
      Creates a new Tool with the given plugin, ID, material, name, flavor text, other lore, stack size, and custom model data.
      Parameters:
      plugin - The JavaPlugin instance for this item
      slot - The armor slot which this piece is for. These can be found in ArmorSlot
      id - A unique string identifier for this item type
      name - The custom name to display for this item
      flavor - The flavor text to display for this item as the first line of lore

    • Armor

      public Armor(org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin, ArmorSlot slot, String id, net.kyori.adventure.text.Component name, org.bukkit.Color color)
      Creates a new Tool with the given plugin, ID, material, name, flavor text, other lore, stack size, and custom model data.
      Parameters:
      plugin - The JavaPlugin instance for this item
      slot - The armor slot which this piece is for. These can be found in ArmorSlot
      id - A unique string identifier for this item type
      name - The custom name to display for this item
      color - The color of the armor piece. This is used for custom models, but is also useful for default armor textures

    • Armor

      public Armor(org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin, ArmorSlot slot, String id, net.kyori.adventure.text.Component name, net.kyori.adventure.text.Component flavor, org.bukkit.Color color)
      Creates a new Tool with the given plugin, ID, material, name, flavor text, other lore, stack size, and custom model data.
      Parameters:
      plugin - The JavaPlugin instance for this item
      slot - The armor slot which this piece is for. These can be found in ArmorSlot
      id - A unique string identifier for this item type
      name - The custom name to display for this item
      flavor - The flavor text to display for this item as the first line of lore
      color - The color of the armor piece. This is used for custom models, but is also useful for default armor textures

    • Armor

      public Armor(org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin, String id, net.kyori.adventure.text.Component name, org.bukkit.Color color)
      Creates a new Tool with the given plugin, ID, material, name, flavor text, other lore, stack size, and custom model data.

      id - A unique string identifier for this item type
      name - The custom name to display for this item
      color - The color of the armor piece. This is used for custom models, but is also useful for default armor textures

    • Armor

      public Armor(org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin, ArmorSlot slot, String id, net.kyori.adventure.text.Component name, int durability, org.bukkit.Color color)
      Creates a new Tool with the given plugin, ID, material, name, flavor text, other lore, stack size, and custom model data.
      Parameters:
      plugin - The JavaPlugin instance for this item
      slot - The armor slot which this piece is for. These can be found in ArmorSlot
      id - A unique string identifier for this item type
      name - The custom name to display for this item
      durability - The custom Item's custom durability
      color - The color of the armor piece. This is used for custom models, but is also useful for default armor textures

    • Armor

      public Armor(org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin, ArmorSlot slot, String id, net.kyori.adventure.text.Component name, net.kyori.adventure.text.Component flavor, int durability, org.bukkit.Color color)
      Creates a new Tool with the given plugin, ID, material, name, flavor text, other lore, stack size, and custom model data.
      Parameters:
      plugin - The JavaPlugin instance for this item
      slot - The armor slot which this piece is for. These can be found in ArmorSlot
      id - A unique string identifier for this item type
      name - The custom name to display for this item
      flavor - The flavor text to display for this item as the first line of lore
      durability - The custom Item's custom durability
      color - The color of the armor piece. This is used for custom models, but is also useful for default armor textures

    • Armor

      public Armor(org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin, ArmorSlot slot, String id, net.kyori.adventure.text.Component name, net.kyori.adventure.text.Component flavor, List<net.kyori.adventure.text.Component> otherLore, int durability, org.bukkit.Color color)
      Creates a new Tool with the given plugin, ID, material, name, flavor text, other lore, stack size, and custom model data.
      Parameters:
      plugin - The JavaPlugin instance for this item
      slot - The armor slot which this piece is for. These can be found in ArmorSlot
      id - A unique string identifier for this item type
      name - The custom name to display for this item
      flavor - The flavor text to display for this item as the first line of lore
      otherLore - The other lore lines to display for this item, excluding the flavor text
      durability - The custom Item's custom durability
      color - The color of the armor piece. This is used for custom models, but is also useful for default armor textures

  • Method Details

    • onEquip

      protected abstract void onEquip(org.bukkit.entity.Player player)
      Should be overridden by inheriters. Provides methods for when a player equips this piece of armor.
      Parameters:
      player - The player who equipped the armor

    • getItem

      public org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack getItem()
      Gets the ItemStack representation of this item, including its material, name, lore, custom model data, and persistent data container for identification.
      Overrides:
      getItem in class Item
      Returns:
      The ItemStack representation of this item

    • getItem

      @Deprecated(since="always", forRemoval=false) public org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack getItem(int amount)
      Deprecated.
      Use getItem() instead
      Not supported for armor.
      Overrides:
      getItem in class Item
      Parameters:
      amount - The amount of the item to get, which should not exceed the maximum stack size for this item type
      Returns:
      The ItemStack representation of this item with the specified amount
      Throws:
      UnsupportedOperationException - always

    • applyAttributes

      protected abstract void applyAttributes(org.bukkit.inventory.meta.ItemMeta meta)
      Should be overridden by inheriters. Applies attributes to a given armor piece.
      Parameters:
      meta - The meta for the item that attributes are being applied to
